description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push to any branch and on any pull request. The workflow has three jobs: macos_universal, win32, and win64. Each job checks out the repository, sets up a cache, installs dependencies, clones and checks out a specific version of the PawPaw repository, bootstraps and builds the project, and uploads the resulting artifacts. The workflow also creates a GitHub release with the uploaded artifacts when a tag is pushed.
